standard number here is 20 and I like to
actually increase this length because if
we increase the length of the range it
can make the ranges more significant but
at the same time if you increase this
number by too much you will miss many

increase the minimum length of you know
around 50% so we increase this one to 30

number you can make the ranges either

we don't want to do because this can
